subcodes.first_line: O friends of Baha'u'llah! Your letters reached me and were read with great joy. Praise be to God
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران الهی و کنیزان بهاء الله نامه های شما رسید بنهایت سرور قرائت گردید حمد خدا
subcodes.subjects: @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha, @East and West; communication between East and West
